summary:
Cognitive Theory, Hierarchy of Needs, and Social Learning all incorporate elements of thinking processes such as belief formation and social modeling; whereas, Classical Conditioning emphasizes simple association between stimuli leading directly to response actions without higher-order cognitions involved. \boxed{D}
